description_long: This is a porcelain teacup with a matching saucer, both adorned with intricate blue floral and ornamental patterns reminiscent of classic English or Victorian china. The cup has a gently flared rim with a thin gold band accentuating the edge, and the saucer mirrors this gold trim along its perimeter. The handle is elegantly curved and also features a subtle gold accent. The interior of the cup is plain white, providing a clean contrast to the ornate exterior. The saucer is octagonal, adding a unique geometric touch to the otherwise traditional set. The overall appearance is refined and decorative, suitable for formal tea settings or as a collectible display piece.
description: A porcelain teacup and saucer set with blue floral patterns and gold trim, featuring an elegant handle and octagonal saucer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's ornate blue pattern and gold rim, with the saucer's matching design visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cup's handle and the continuity of the blue floral motif around the cup and saucer.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the symmetrical pattern on both cup and saucer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle on the left, displaying the cup's flared rim and detailed pattern.
